SELECT
status,
COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM trades
WHERE exchange = 'VIRTUAL'
GROUP BY status;

open	450
closed	5931

SELECT
id,
trade_id,
market_id,
side,
size,
price,
gross_pnl,
total_fees,
net_pnl,
status,
executed_at,
settled_at
FROM trades
WHERE exchange = 'VIRTUAL'
  AND status = 'closed'
ORDER BY settled_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS zero_size_trades
FROM trades
WHERE exchange = 'VIRTUAL'
  AND size = 0;
6891

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS total_virtual_trades,
SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_trades,
SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_trades,
SUM(gross_pnl) AS total_gross_pnl,
SUM(net_pnl) AS total_net_pnl
FROM trades
WHERE exchange = 'VIRTUAL';
7056	5931	1125	0.00000000	-297.00000000

SELECT
timestamp,
total_capital,
available,
allocated,
(available + allocated) AS calculated_total
FROM bankroll
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS paper_trades_count
FROM paper_trades;
513

SELECT
COUNT(*) AS virtual_trades_count
FROM trades
WHERE exchange = 'VIRTUAL';

SELECT
timestamp,
total_trades,
win_count,
loss_count,
daily_pnl
FROM bankroll
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20;
